misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Zoro bros are mad at me, but lies are being spread here. First off, I never said their attack didn't cause any damage. By "unsuccessful," I meant we didn't see the demons revert back. I
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Zoro bros are mad at me, but lies are being spread here. First off, I never said their attack didn't cause any damage. By "unsuccessful," I meant we didn't see the demons revert back. I never said Zoro did nothing; I even said Zoro's team attacked (the wording here isn't very clever i agree). Furthermore, I never said Zoro was shocked that Chopper reverted a giant. Also, I directly never compared Zoro and Chopper. I'm even more inclined to think Chopper DF had something to do with it (@3SkullJoe's theory is really good for that). Means not because of Chopper AP>Zoro AP lol. Don't fall for the lies, bros. Only misinfo I shared was the Sanji Head stuff.^^ Peace love you guys🙌

misc.title: Sanji: That's all well and good but it infuriates me that these "weaklings" were giving "Elbaf" so much grief"
misc.text: Sanji: That's all well and good but it infuriates me that these "weaklings" were giving "Elbaf" so much grief"

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Bro Sanji and Franky chill😭 "Sanji: There's apparently a way to snuff em out for good but... Sanji: Are these really the knights that protect Marijoea? Franky: Maybe we've become a bit
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Bro Sanji and Franky chill😭 "Sanji: There's apparently a way to snuff em out for good but... Sanji: Are these really the knights that protect Marijoea? Franky: Maybe we've become a bit too strong... Franky: Luffy's a Yonko you know? Sanji: That's all well and good but it infuriates me that these "weaklings" were giving "Elbaf" so much grief" Translation thanks to PuckTheGreat(worstgenforum)

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 *After Nami scolds Luffy. Ragnir is patting Luffy's back, consoling him, LOL* Luffy: Because of you, I got scolded, Loki!!! Loki: I’m crushing those bastards trying to harm Elbaph! Why d
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 *After Nami scolds Luffy. Ragnir is patting Luffy's back, consoling him, LOL* Luffy: Because of you, I got scolded, Loki!!! Loki: I’m crushing those bastards trying to harm Elbaph! Why do I have to get scolded too by one of your crew (nakama)?! *Loki shots a lightning breath blast at Luffy* Luffy: GYAAAAHHHH!!! Oh… it’s just lightning… Loki: Why didn’t it work?! Luffy: If it had worked, I would’ve sent you flying! 😭😭😭

misc.title: ⚠️ Cambio de fecha: Sentimos anunciar que el sexto volumen de Dragon Quest The Adventure of Dai, previsto para el 01/04, llegará finalmente a librerías el 29/04. Sentimos las molestias ocasionadas por
misc.text: ⚠️ Cambio de fecha: Sentimos anunciar que el sexto volumen de Dragon Quest The Adventure of Dai, previsto para el 01/04, llegará finalmente a librerías el 29/04. Sentimos las molestias ocasionadas por este pequeño retraso. 🌐 planetacomic.com Planeta Cómic (@PlanetadComic) ¡Llegó el día! ⚔️ En abril llegará a librerías el esperado sexto volumen de #DragonQuest #TheAdventureOfDai. ¡Bengana, donde Dai se encuentra de visita en busca de nuevas armas, es atacada por una manada de dragones! Y aunque la ciudad logra ser salvada gracias al poder desplegado por el emblema de Dai, la población siente miedo de un poder desconocido, y que carece en absoluto de humanidad… ¡¡Dai se dirige ahora hacia el santuario del caballero del dragón, donde tratará de descubrir cuál es su verdadera identidad…!! #shonen — https://nitter.net/PlanetadComic/status/2014717626174378449#m
